# Brali LifeOS

> A local-first personal growth application for planning, Growth Zones, practical routines, check-ins, journals, insights, and personal data export.

- Canonical website: https://brali-lifeos.github.io/
- Growth Library: https://brali-lifeos.github.io/life-os/
- Features: https://brali-lifeos.github.io/features/
- Getting started: https://brali-lifeos.github.io/docs/
- Privacy: https://brali-lifeos.github.io/privacy/
- Product facts: https://brali-lifeos.github.io/product-facts.json

Brali app data is stored locally on the user device. The app includes backup, restore, and export tools. The static website does not use a login, contact form, advertising, or third-party analytics scripts.
